datasets.label: Triple-N macaque natural images
datasets.subject: Macaque visual cortex
datasets.description: fMRI-guided Neuropixels recordings from IT and early visual cortex while macaques viewed natural images.

datasets.label: JapanEEG speech audio clips
datasets.signal: event-aligned EEG bandpower + acoustic audio features
datasets.subject: Human EEG/EMG/audio speech dataset
datasets.description: Lightweight 3D point layouts for JapanEEG listening clips, colored by source speaker/run, with click-to-play audio and transcripts.
